steps.title: Rewrite the radical
steps.content:
Use the rule that an $a$th root is the same as raising to the power $1/a$.
$$\sqrt[a]{r^{48}}=r^{48/a}$$

steps.title: Set exponents equal
steps.content:
Since $r>1$, equal powers of $r$ have equal exponents. Set the exponent from the radical equal to the target exponent.
$$48/a=8/9$$

steps.title: Solve for the root index
steps.content:
Cross-multiply and solve for $a$.
$$48(9)=8a$$
$$432=8a$$
$$a=54$$
The answer is 54.
